methods.description: Process for assessing lake depth and sediment thickness using Ground Penetrating Radar (GPR) and creating a high-resolution Digital Elevation Model (DEM) using UAV-based photogrammetry.

steps.description: Performed a Ground Penetrating Radar (GPR) survey using a Malå ProEx system connected to a 50 MHz shielded antenna.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct GPR survey with Malå ProEx system

steps.description: Processed GPR data in RadExplorer software using bandpass filtering, DC removal, and time-zero adjustment.
Created a 10 cm resolution DEM using Structure from Motion (SfM) photogrammetry on UAV imagery.
steps.searchable_summary: generate DEM from UAV imagery using SfM

steps.description: Processed UAV imagery in Agisoft Photoscan to align photos, generate dense point cloud, and build a height field mesh.
steps.searchable_summary: process UAV imagery with Agisoft Photoscan

steps.description: Exported DEM in GeoTIFF format for further analysis using Esri ArcGIS.
steps.searchable_summary: export DEM to GeoTIFF for ArcGIS analysis

methods.description: Procedure for recovering sediment cores from Lake Ástjörn using piston and gravity corers.

steps.description: Selected a flat section in the central part of the basin for coring.
steps.searchable_summary: select coring site in lake basin

steps.description: Used a hammer driven piston corer and a Uwitec gravity corer to extract sediment cores.
steps.searchable_summary: extract sediment cores with piston and gravity corers

methods.description: Techniques for analyzing sediment core AST-P2-18 using XRF scanning, CT scanning, and destructive analyses.

steps.description: Mapped sediment geochemistry with an X-Ray Fluorescence (XRF) core scanner.
steps.searchable_summary: perform XRF scanning on sediment core

steps.description: Visualized sediment structure in 3-D using a CT scanner.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct CT scanning for 3-D sediment visualization

steps.description: Performed destructive analyses to determine organic content, density, and grain size distribution.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze sediment for organic content and grain size

methods.description: Methods for dating sediment cores using radiocarbon dating and tephra analysis.

steps.description: Sent samples for AMS radiocarbon dating.
Extracted and identified basaltic tephra horizons for geochronological analysis.

methods.description: Statistical procedures for generating a chronology and analyzing grain size distributions.

steps.description: Generated a chronology using the Clam package in R.
steps.searchable_summary: create chronology with Clam in R

steps.description: Decomposed sample Grain Size Distributions (GSDs) using End-Member Modeling Analysis (EMMA).
steps.searchable_summary: perform EMMA on grain size distributions
